SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft

Interface IndirectNavigableMap<K,V>

Type Parameters:
K - the key type
V - the value type
All Superinterfaces:
Map<K,V>, NavigableMap<K,V>, SequencedMap<K,V>, SortedMap<K,V>
public interface IndirectNavigableMap<K,V> extends NavigableMap<K,V>
A navigable map interface that delegates operations to an internal map.

Implementations provide the backing map via getElements() and inherit default delegate implementations for all map operations.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface java.util.Map

    Map.Entry<K,V>
